---
title: "\'Lectures on Church History, given at Winchester\'  by the Editor"
---

## \'Lectures on Church History, given at Winchester\'  by the Editor

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1889
**Genre:** Non-fiction, theology, history
**Format:** Articles in Journal

**Publisher:** MP (January 1889-August 1890)

### Notes

These articles, which appear as both \'Lectures on church history\' and \'Lectures on English church history\' appeared in two series.  It is not clear who the original audience in Winchester were.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
